Record Class Location

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Record
de.uka.ilkd.key.parser.Location
Record Components:
fileUri - The location of the resource of the Location. May be null!
position - The position in the file
All Implemented Interfaces:
Comparable<Location>
public record Location(URI fileUri, Position position) extends Record implements Comparable<Location>
This class represents a location in a file. It consists of a filename, a line number and a column number. The filename may be null, if the file is unknown (e.g. standard input). The class is mainly used for parser exceptions.

Both line and column numbers are assumed to be 1-based. That is the first character is on line 1, column 1.

  • Constructor Details

    • Location

      public Location(URI fileUri, Position position)
      Creates an instance of a Location record class.
      Parameters:
      fileUri - the value for the fileUri record component
      position - the value for the position record component

  • Method Details

    • fromFileName

      @Deprecated public static Location fromFileName(String filename, Position position)
      Deprecated.
      Use Location(URI, Position) instead.
      Legacy constructor for creating a new Location from a String denoting the file path and line and column number, tries to convert the path given as String into a URL.
      Parameters:
      filename - path to the resource of the Location
      position - position of the Location
      Throws:
      RuntimeException - if the given string is null or can not be parsed to URL

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Internal string representation. Do not rely on format!
      Specified by:
      toString in class Record

    • equals

      public boolean equals(Object o)
      Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one. The objects are equal if the other object is of the same class and if all the record components are equal. All components in this record class are compared with Objects::equals(Object,Object).
      Specified by:
      equals in class Record
      Parameters:
      o - the object with which to compare
      Returns:
      true if this object is the same as the o argument; false otherwise.

    • hashCode

      public int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code value for this object. The value is derived from the hash code of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      hashCode in class Record
      Returns:
      a hash code value for this object
